author: Gustavo de Aguiar Martins

interpretation.boundary: Canonical low-authority traces are preserved as legacy warnings; native runtime traces must stay complete and clean.
interpretation.purpose: Index every PNVA decision as event, entity, heuristic, tension and proof.
interpretation.sovereignty: A decision is publishable only when its actor, rules, causal chain, threshold signal and proof hash are visible.

recommendations: Use this index as the reviewer-facing map from event IDs to entities, rules, tension and proof.
Prefer native H2/H3 authority for all new runtime traces.
Keep trace coverage at 1.0 before publishing any future evidence package.
